title: France joins Germany, Italy, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Denmark, and more EU countries in ushering in the era of seamless travel with the fully operational EES system, preparing for the highly anticipated ETIAS visa authorization to redefine travel security by 2 - Travel And Tour World
